priority.full_text:
That water clarity is an engineering decision, and the math behind it is wilder than the video.

Roman aqueducts ran on gravity alone. No pumps, no pressure systems. Engineers carved channels with a gradient so shallow it borders on absurd. The Pont du Gard in southern France
priority.summary: 罗马水渠工程奇迹：仅靠重力无需水泵，梯度精确到近乎荒谬。庞杜加尔水渠为例，展现古代工程数学的极致。
angles: 古罗马工程师的数学绝活：梯度精确到荒谬
